change.title: Review factory smoke task
change.description: A caller-owned task submits source-agnostic review input and stores the returned artifact in its run ledger.
change.diff:
diff --git a/src/review_factory.rs b/src/review_factory.rs
--- a/src/review_factory.rs
+++ b/src/review_factory.rs
@@ -1,3 +1,4 @@
 pub fn build() {
+    // CERBERUS_FAKE_FINDING
 }

context.summary: Event-plane task fixture for a code review workload.
acceptance: Caller owns trigger, run ledger, retries, and budget envelope.
Cerberus owns only review request validation and review artifact production.
